game.title: Correspondence
game.short_text: A game where you send and receive messages in deep space.

details.title: Correspondence
details.description:
If your Browser struggles to run the game try toggling on Hardware Acceleration, or feel free to download the Windows version below.

Congratulations, your application has been accepted and you've been chosen to work for Interstellar Mail Incorporated. It is an honor to have you with us, you'll be a valuable asset to the company. 
We'll be flying you to your station, Hermes-25 in Quadrant - G6 first thing tonight, and you can immediately begin working tomorrow. Enjoy our facilities and remember, IMI connects the cosmos so no one will ever be alone. 

A casual game where you vibe in a space station while you send and receive messages. Every message has a story to tell, progress the game to find out what happens next and discover more stories. ﻿Or, just chill and explore the station.

Movement Controls:
W  =  forward 
A = Left
S = Down 
D= Right

Quotes:

"It's not about winning, it's about sending a message"


Credits:
Sound effects obtained from https://www.zapsplat.comAdditional sound effects obtained from https://mixkit.coMain menu music - https://dova-s.jp/bgm/play17203.html

game.title: Strandolio
game.short_text: A society management deck-builder where your cards are little dudes and they are not easy to keep happy.

details.title: Strandolio
details.description:
Stranded in the middle of a far-off sea, your society of little guys is at your mercy. You must keep them alive, fed, and most importantly: social. In Strandolio, loneliness is just as big a threat as starvation, but unfortunately not all of your villagers will be here to make friends...
- Interlocking systems!
- 23 unique cards, that turn into 23 unique little guys when you play them!
- Lots of different strategies! 
Uncover all of Strandolio's secrets and survive as long as you can!The browser version of the game runs slightly worse than the downloadable version, and has some graphical bugs as well. Downloading is recommended for the optimal StrandolioTM *experience*.

game.title: ROB.O.T.S.
game.short_text: 2D rogue-lite shooter featuring a cute and innocent Robot called ROB and its team of friendly and not dangerous minions.

details.title: ROB.O.T.S.
details.description:
ROB.O.T.S. (Rob On the Spot) is a 2D rogue-lite shooter featuring a cute and innocent Robot called ROB and its team of friendly and not dangerous minions.

              

Tired of being used as a lab rat, ROB decides to escape the HQ in which it was created, but to reach this goal, it will need to face many different obstacles (including evil scientists, bullets going everywhere, and more!).But don't be afraid! While moving on, you will be able to collect scraps to upgrade ROB and its minions, and in a matter of few (we hope) matches, you will be in control of an unstoppable death squad!



Movement  //  WASDAim  //  MouseShoot  //  Left click
Interact  //  E

We recommend playing the game in full screen. If the game lags in full screen, please try downloading the Windows version below.
John arrives at his late grandpa’s empty mansion to pick up family heirlooms in the attic. He is not alone. Survive grief-fueled attacks from an unexpected visitor in this story-driven bullet hell game.

game.title: Nightwatch
game.short_text: Those creepy silhouettes in your room at night may just be monsters...

details.title: Nightwatch
details.description:
Created in 7 days for Brackeys Jam 2022.2
Theme: You're not alone.


Magpie - Programmer, DesignerEurus - ProgrammerW35- DesignerCal - Sound Engineer
/

You're lying in bed at night, unable to sleep... the moonlight coming in from the bedroom window is casting a dull light upon the vintage furniture. In front of the bedroom window, is a cabinet... was that cabinet always there? It looks oddly shaped... and it's moving..?!
/

[Mouse] to rotate the player.[W][A][S][D] to move.[E] to interact.[R] to reload.
/

Goal: Explore the mansion and try not to get caught! Collect the 6 generator parts you need to fix the generator, collect the master key and head out of the front door of the mansion to escape!
Torch: The torch is your weapon. Shine the light on the glowing footsteps for 2 seconds. What you thought was a creepy monster will actually just be some furniture..?
Condition: Being spotted by a monster will make you feel unwell. The lower your condition, the worse your vision will become. Stand in the presence of green lamps, or use a fireplace as a checkpoint to recover.
Map: The map consists of two floors. There are 3 generator parts on each floor. The generator is on the bottom floor. The master key is on the top floor. The exit is in the big hall on the bottom floor, to the south.
/

Deaver's House by Nick Slough [CC-BY], via Poly PizzaGolden Skeleton Key. by VR XRTIST [CC-BY], via Poly Pizza
Trading Card by Vice Cooper [CC-BY], via Poly PizzaWireless Machine by Kenney

game.title: NotAlone Inc.
game.short_text: You're in the business of fear. Use your ghosts employees to frighten the living

details.title: NotAlone Inc.
details.description:
Thank you for the 7th place! <3



Congratulations [Insert name here],
You are the newest member of NotAlone Incorporated! 
The company for the ghosts, by the ghosts. 
Our department is specialized in instilling fear and depression to humans, destined to clients that seek vengeance, or just warn a relative. Your role, as a Fear Planner, is to guide our field officiers to successfully achieve the desired result. Don't worry, for your first missions, you will be assigned a manager to help you. 
Welcome to the team, [Insert name here]!
NotAlone Incorporated, because your are not alone... And neither are they.
This game was made entirely in one week, for the Brackeys GameJam 2022.2. The theme was: "You're not alone"

Controls
Left click -> Select ghost (Or use the numbered keys)Right click -> Move ghostE -> Haunt itemMiddle mouse button / W, A, S, D -> Move the cameraScrollwheel -> Zoom in and out

Credits
Maxime  "Vylozeny" Fieffé -> Programming / Sound Design / Voice Acting
Loïc  "MetalFox Dioxymore" Parra -> Programming / Music / Level Design
Guillaume  "Youhou" Sarramegna -> Additional Level Design
Kenney.nl -> 3D Models
Mixamo -> Animations
Additional Models -> Chris Nolet
Additional Textures -> LowlyPoly / YAH Agency

Known Issues
There seem to have some hitboxes shenanigans if you play the game in fullscreen on Firefox. 
It works as intended on Chrome or on the Windows build if you encounter this problem.
If all the characters get stuck in one spot, you can refresh the page, go to the main menu and use the "continue" button to restart the level, sorry about that!

game.title: Sudo K.O.
game.short_text: Fill sudoku puzzles to fight monsters!

details.title: Sudo K.O.
details.description:
Fill sudokus to fight against monsters and gain better loot as a reward. How far can you go without perishing? Claim your spot on the online leaderboards!
In case you didn't know, sudoku is a traditional puzzle where you fill a 9 by 9 board so that every row, column and 3 by 3 section has all the numbers from 1 to 9. So none of the rows, columns or sections can have any duplicates.
Tools used

game.title: Together Alone
game.short_text: Two friends travel Alone in this spooky house full of intricate puzzles and platforming!

details.title: Together Alone
details.description: Brackey's Game Jam 2022.2 Theme: You're not Alone 2nd Jam! Two friends work together inside a spooky mansion full of interesting challenges in this puzzle platformer! Can you get you and your friend out of this predicament? -----------------------------This project emphasized level design and creating a smooth learning curve for the player, gradually introducing mechanics through tutorial, exploration, and challenge levels. The unique twist of controlling two separate characters, one with indirect controls via toggling the lights, adds depth to the puzzle-platformer genre through a variety of puzzle possibilities. Key Accomplishments: Level Design and Pacing: Levels were crafted to explore the interactions between mechanics, encouraging players to apply their learnings creatively.Polish and User Experience: We focused on designing a smooth learning curve that balances difficulty, allowing for a gradual understanding of core mechanics.Iterative Improvements: Future plans include refining the control scheme to prevent mechanic clashes, adding more levels and mechanics, and further improving the user experience. We believe this project successfully delivered an engaging puzzle-platformer experience and has room for continued expansion and refinement, such as improving the control scheme and creating a smoother learning curve to enhance user experience. ----------------------------- Credit for use of: Mouse Icon - Mouse clicker icons created by Freepik - Flaticon Light Switch SFX - This game uses these sounds from freesound: "  Light_Switch-0004-On-02" by DWOBoyl (https://freesound.org/people/DWOBoyle/sounds/144291/) licensed under CCBY 3.0 Picture Frame (Level Selector) - picture frame clipart PNG Designed By 千图网 from

details.title: Wanderfish

Attention Mac Users:For some reason we can't figure out, keyboard events don't seem to work. You will have to rely on playing with the mouse.
Before we begin: Please make sure that hardware acceleration is enabled in your browser. It should be by default, but if you're experiencing lag, try to enable it.
In untitled fish game, fish want to move from one pond to another! However, they will never do so alone.
This is a puzzle game! If you want to learn the mechanics of the game by playing it, don't read farther than this line and stay away from the Instructions button. Check out the controls in game :)
Controls
Left Click - Place down tiles.Q & E - Rotate TilesBackspace, Delete, X & Right Click - Delete Tiles
Game Mechanics
Fish take the shortest path possibleWhen there are multiple paths with the same length, the fish will split up on their way to the goalA fisherman will catch one passing fishAll river tiles need to be connected.

game.title: Hank and Tea (Jam Version)
game.short_text: A short puzzler about Hank and Tea working together

details.title: Hank and Tea (Jam Version)
details.description:
Hank and Tea
You play as Hank, where you can move with WASD. Tea however, copies Hank but in the opposite direction. Nobody knows why, they've just been like this for their entire life.
Hank (you) and Tea have to solve puzzles together involving many different colours of tile which do different things. Hank needs to reach the red tile at the same time Tea reaches the green tile.
Types of Tile
Blue - You can walk on these tiles freely.Red/Green - These are the goals.White  - Triggers on and off some orange tiles.Orange - If they are active, they cannot be passed through.Grey - Inactivate orange tiles, they can be passed throughPurple  - They cannot be passed through

These two birds can't get along!
They've managed to get themselves stuck together inside of a plastic soda ring, and now have to work together to find a way to break free!
Controls are W A S D to move
[ Space ] is to jump
E swaps control between the birds. When controlling the pink bird, the yellow one will stand still, acting like an anchor  until you switch back or throw it.
To throw the yellow bird first pick it up by pressing E when close to it. Then press E again to toss it into the air.

details.title: Cake War
details.description:
NOTE
The game can randomly crash in the browser (might be fixed now)The upgrade on the top right is bugged. You have to click in the lower left corner of it.The game might be a bit to hard or way too easy (Tip: try to get one upgrade to level 10. The elite can carry you throughout the game)The screen will shake way too much in the later stages of the game (when you kill multiple enemies at the same time).

Welcome to Cake War.
You are not alone in this game. All your friends are now against you in this war. Kill all your friends and gain experience points to level up and become more powerful. 
Be careful, your friends will spawn faster and after every 5 minutes a boss will arrive to aid them.

Controls:
Move: WASD
Shoot: Left Click
Upgrade: Left click (top right one is bugged; you have to hover on the lower left corner to select it)

Upgrades:
All upgrades have 10 levels. After reaching level 10 on one specific skill, you unlock the elite version of that skill. The elite skill is a lot better than the normal skill.
Banana: Shoot a banana that returns to you
Banana-elite: Bananas ricochets 1 time on you (goes back and forth 2 times)
Donut: Summons a donut that spins around you
Donut-elite: Donut of Doom increases the size, damage, and speed of all donuts. 
Cone: Shoots a cone that homes towards enemies
Cone-elite: Each cone can hit enemies 5 times.
Utensil: Shoots a utensil in a random direction
Utensil-elite: All utensils homes towards enemies.
Chocolate: A small chance to spawn a chocolate when an enemy dies, dealing massive damage to enemies around it.
Chocolate-elite: Banana split. When a chocolate explodes, it also spawns 6 bananas and 12 sugar pieces.

game.title: Moodlings
game.short_text: Can you survive a murderous seven day work week on a ranch?

details.title: Moodlings
details.description:
Moodlings is a game about you, and dozens of creatures called Moodlings. The goal of the game is to survive a 7 day work week at a ranch, where Moodlings sprout up from the ground. You will need to make sure Moodlings  (Sicklings)  that turn sick &  Moodlings (Murderlings) that turn evil don't disrupt your daily Moodling quota. Otherwise you will get fired. You also have to make sure you don't die on the job...
The game was a solo project for the Brackeys 2022.2 Game Jam. Please play the game in full screen so you get the most accurate view of the games graphics.
Instructions
-WASD to move
-Left mouse click to fire Pacifier(gun)
-Right mouse click to use Cleanser
-G key to use grenade
Tips (Read only if you find the game hard)
-Positioning is the most important tool in your arsenal. Search for areas where there aren't many Moodlings so you can have a clear shot in quickly culling Muderlings and Sicklings. Moodlings are also quite small. By constantly being on the move you should get numerous lines of sights to your targets.
-Don't be afraid to sacrifice Moodlings. If a single Moodling is blocking your line of sight killing them is a small price to be ready for the next changling. Also having too many Moodlings can be an issue if sickness starts to spread. Try to balance out your Moodlings to your near day quotas.
-Use grenades on Murderlings due to their 2 hit health. By throwing a grenade at a Murderling and then firing at them you will most likely kill them (and their target) very quickly. This is especially efficient due to their standing cooldown after an attack.
-Use the Cleanser when it seems you're about to have a sickling outbreak. Be careful with timing as the cooldown is long. The Cleanser can also be used as a predictive measure whilst you go after other types of Moodlings in later days.

moreInfo.Author: IceVein

game.title: Skull Slayer
game.short_text: ​Send the evil skulls back where they came from in this Doom-inspired shooter!

details.title: Skull Slayer
details.description:
ABOUT
Skull Slayer is a Doom-inspired retro shooter where you must vanquish evil skulls to proceed to the next level. When ammo and health run low, make sure to scavenge the levels for pickups for that needed boost. 
HOW TO PLAY
Use the WASD/ arrow keys to moveUse the mouse to look around and click the left mouse button to shootWhilst exploring, keep an eye out for enemies to kill and pickups to replenish your health and ammo. 
CREDITS
Made by Dan Campbell - Twitter Voiced by Daniel Thirlaway
Assets provided by gamesplusjames - YouTube
CREATOR MESSAGE
Skull Slayer is one of my first projects made with Unity and it has taught me some important lessons. Working with my friend Daniel to implement voice lines into the game was a fun but informative process and GamesPlusJames tutorial series gave me the insight and knowledge to tackle future projects. Thanks for playing!

game.title: Fusebots
game.short_text: Use the bots' different abilities and their combinations to overcome the challenges.

details.title: Fusebots
details.description:
Fusebots
[Created for the Brackeys 2022.2 Game Jam]

Finally! You're free from your cell in the Robot Experimentation Laboratory, but you can't escape on your own, luckily, you're not alone!
Control three modular bots as they clear puzzles trying to escape from a laboratory, use the bots' different abilities and their combinations to overcome the challenges.
Gameplay
A little beaver who fears darkness gets stuck inside the house. The lights keep going out and monsters appear in the darkness and are scaring him. He needs to find his way to his room without letting the monsters get him. He uses the switches to turn the lights on to be safe, and see where he's going.

Controls
 W, A, S, D to move.
J to shoot.
K to block.
L to combine.
U to switch character.
I to change the AI companions mode (Follow or Stay in place).
Credits
Programming:
Mohazza

Game Desgin:
Alkrick

Mohgam

Character Art:
Alkrick
Environment Art:
Craftpix.net
VFX, UI and other Graphics:
Mohgam
SFX:
https://freesound.org/

moreInfo.Author: MT-Pad Dev
moreInfo.Tags: 2D, Pixel Art, Puzzle-Platformer

game.title: Enquiquineur
game.short_text: A pesky player (and exit) does not want you to win…

details.title: Enquiquineur
details.description:
Pesky Player
A simple task, an annoying other player. You’re not alone, but wish you were! (Or do you?)
(This is a very simple game/prototype as I discovered the game jam near the end and started late because of my partaking in Mini Jam 113, but I thought the idea was worth a try!)
Made with Love2D.
Controls
Arrow keys to moveMouse to light up the scenery and click on the PAUSE buttonIf you lose, you just have to close the application and relaunch if you want to try again.
Made for Brackeys Game Jam 2022.2 with theme ‘You’re not alone’. (Running time: from August 21st 2022 at 12:00 PM to August 28th 2022 at 12:00 PM.)
While ranking and marks are not everything and can be biased, the game still ended up at the 10th position in ‘Innovation’! Glad that people found interest in the concept, which I think is extendable. :) If I find the time, I may turn this prototype into something bigger (either as levels or a more ‘continuous’ whole). Thanks for playing!Known Bugs
The navigator version seems to have some problems in fullscreen mode:
The movement keys do not respond on my system (using Firefox);The more the real mouse is away from the centre, the more the  virtual player’s cursor appears shifted. This is minor and probably due to changing the dimensions.
So, I would recommend not toggling fullscreen on, or using a desktop version.If you have Love2D (or want to install it), the .love file is more lightweight and should be usable on all systems (see this).macOS version: download the ZIP archive, unzip it, which gives you directly the APP file.Windows version: download the ZIP archive, unzip it, and launch the EXE file (without fiddling with the other files).There is no proper Linux version because of the variety of distributions, but you can use the .love file. Some instructions  are available in the Love2D documentation, in case you need it. (I  tried using AppImage, but encountered problems, while getting Love2D is  easy, so the current situation is already reasonable.)

game.title: Foo Heppy
game.short_text: Solve puzzles and learn an alien language to rescue a stranded colonist.

details.title: Foo Heppy
details.description:
This game was created in one week for Brackeys Jam 2022.2. Please excuse the janky artwork, I over-scoped as per usual.
You've come to an alien planet to facilitate an emergency evacuation. Someone there needs your help, but you'll have to learn her language in order to bring her to safety.
ControlsWASD - movementE - interact
How To PlayThe radio menu (accessed with the '...' button) allows you to send and receive messages with the alien. You click each word to form your message and hit "Send", and the alien will respond. 
Each new word you learn gets added to a list. You can use that list to guess at the word's correct translation.
Good luck and have fun!
AttributionsFreesound.org - Button Click Sound

game.title: Introvert
game.short_text: You wake up at a House Party - Your worst nightmare...

details.title: Introvert
details.description:
You're an introvert. A socially awkward person that gets extreme anxiety when around people for too long. You wake up on a floor at an unknown location. When you look around you to assess the situation, you realise where you are. A house party - your worst nightmare!
Race through maze-like levels that seem never ending and escape before it's too late! Burst through endless amounts of doors in search for the glorious shiny exit. You'll have to strategise in order to find it and memorising the floorplan of the house is key to finding the exit and escaping! Can you escape the party before it's too late?
* The game is very poorly optimised as I am very bad at optimisation. If you're getting very low FPS, I suggest setting the Graphics Quality to Medium or Low. It is only available for Windows. I tried adding support for Mac and WebGL, but sadly Unity broke and I couldn't export versions for them.
This game was made for the Brackeys Game Jam 2022.2 with the theme being You're not alone. This is my first time participating in a Jam and I hope you enjoy my short little game that I made over the course of 1 week.

game.title: Home Alone
game.short_text: They may have left... but someone's just arrived.

details.title: Home Alone
details.description:
Note: The core game was made in a week for the Brackeys Game Jam 2022.2. It has received QoL patches but not much else.
CONTROLS
WASD - Move
LMB - Interact/Advance Dialogue
RMB - Zoom
P - Pause Game
THE SCENARIO
Your parents are heading to a fancy dinner and have to leave you behind. It's not a big deal, you're old enough to take care of yourself now. It's simple, just do the chores your parents left for you and the night will be all yours... or will it?
GAMEPLAY
This game is a short, atmospheric horror demo/prototype that dumbs down the gameplay and turns up the scares. How will you handle the obstacles laid before you? Will you stumble and become a victim, or be brave, and leave freely?
DEVELOPER NOTES
This is my first game submitted to Itch and my first game jam submission. There are many aspects about this game that I would love to improve on, but as of writing this, it's 5:00AM and I just want to get this uploaded and drink to celebrate. So, I hope you enjoy this short game. If it wasn't obvious already, I was heavily inspired by games like Fears To Fathom and the Puppet Combo titles. Really cool developers/games, you should check 'em out. Anyways, congratulations to all my fellow Brackeys Game Jam participants, and thanks to Brackeys for teaching me so many helpful things.
PS: I forgor 💀 to mention that all the low poly models were sourced from here.
CREDITS LINK

game.title: Cairn
game.short_text: A game about climbing and leaving a path for others.

details.title: Cairn
details.description:
CONTROLS
EscapePauseWASD or arrow keysMoveSpaceHold to jump (or tap to double jump!)EInteract
Collecting bugs allows you to make changes to the area above you. But before you can submit those changes, you have to beat it yourself, to make sure others can follow!
WHAT IS CAIRN?
Cairn is a game about climbing a mountain and leaving your mark for future travelers.

In Cairn, you play as Daisy, an intrepid adventurer bound for the top of a seemingly endless tower. Along the way, you're aided by mysterious wildlife that allow you to shift parts of the ground, writing your name into the path before you. Will you create advantages for yourself and for others that come afterwards? Or will you contribute to the havoc of the spiraling monolith?

Cairn is a "live world" homage to Jump King. It carries a lot of the mechanical and visual spirit of the game, but strives to be a little cheerier and significantly more chaotic by allowing players to completely morph the original experience of the game. Any change you make to the world is reflected in everyone else's game, the map you see now is a culmination of everyone's changes across the world.

game.short_text: Sneak a Footlong Calling Card into Unsuspecting Customers' Pockets!

details.title: Hotdog Man's Delicious Intent: A Stealth Advertising Campaign for Ghost Pepper Frankfurters
details.description:
Sneak up on unsuspecting customers and place Hotdog Man's Ghost Pepper Frankfurter in their pocket. Win by standing next to the Target to fill up the  Ketchup Splat indicating success.
Don't let them see or hear you, though! The 'Sus Meter' will go up with every suspicious activity. Get a full Sus Meter and it's Game Over!
Interactable objects are highlighted by a Mustard Bottle  when you're close enough. Interact with objects to hide behind cover
Controls
WASD - MoveShift - Run (but will increase the Sus Meter from the sound you make!)Space - Interact with nearby objects to avoid suspicionM - Toggle musicN - Toggle sound effects

game.title: Insomnia
game.short_text: Find your way through the darkness... But don't let it take control...

details.title: Insomnia
details.description:
Note:


If you encounter any bug please contact me and i will make sure to fix it as soon as possible.

game.short_text: A top down shooter game. Made it in 7 days For the Brackeys Game Jam

details.description:
Life on Mars.... Maybe, We are not alone.
A small team of astronauts, have arrived on Mars, while one of the members, "03" is doing his research. He is contacted by the commander, that there is a certain activity. He must follow the order and go searching. from there, we find out if he is alone or not...
A top down shooter game. Made it in 7 days For the Brackeys Game Jam. 
Theme: "You're Not Alone"

_______________________________________________________

PLEASE READ!
If you reduce the size of the browser window, it keeps its aspect ratio  but reduces the resolution.. that's how it works smoothly.



Use Firefox, it's the one that works best for me


_______________________________________________________

CONTROLS:
[W][A][S][D] to move
[Mouse] to rotate the player[E] to interact.
[Left Mouse Button] to shoot

Thank you!!

moreInfo.Tags: Aliens, brackeys-game-jam, mars, Singleplayer, Space, Top-Down, Top Down Adventure, Top down shooter, youre-not-alone

game.title: Ghost Town
game.short_text: discover the land of purgatory on a journey to find yourself.

details.title: Ghost Town
details.description:
You have died, which is where most stories usually end, but you have work to do. Discover why your soul refuses to cross the barrier, Show the people of Ghost Town that just because they feel lonely, it doesn't make them alone, and maybe in the process, cure a town of it's chronic loneliness. 
Ghost Town is an open-world RPG made in 7 days for the Brackeys Game Jam 2022.2, with the theme of "You're not alone." I had an absolute blast making this game, and i hope that people enjoy it!
Credits:
Game Design, Artwork, Music, Dialog, Programming, Story : TheCodeMaster

moreInfo.Rating: Rated 5.0 out of 5 stars(1 total ratings)
moreInfo.Author: TheCodeMaster
moreInfo.Tags: Dark, Ghosts, Horror, Music, Open World, Story Rich

game.title: Fury of the Weald
game.short_text: The silent solitude of the weald has been interrupted by humans

details.title: Fury of the Weald
details.description:
You are not alone. The silent solitude of the weald has been interrupted by humans, once again. You, the forest's guardian spirit, must roust these insolent pests and destroy their vile machines. Cleanse the land of the humans' waste, and show no mercy as you invoke the wrath of Mother Nature.
---
This game is a submission for the Brackeys Jam 2022.2! Credits are as follows:
Codebolt - Programming, Design
Sophie Martin - Music Composition
Autumn Moulios - Sound Design, Audio Programming
Jessica Wake - Art, Design
Enrico Widodo - Programming, Design
Herman Wu - Programming, Design, Producer

moreInfo.Rating: Rated 4.0 out of 5 stars(1 total ratings)

game.title: Unknown Corridor
game.short_text: An industrial horror puzzle-platformer for Brackeys Game Jam 2022.2.

details.title: Unknown Corridor
details.description:
Unknown Corridor is an industrial horror puzzle-platformer for Brackeys Game Jam 2022.2.
You wake up in an old abandoned factory with no recollection of how you ended up there. It's up to you to use your wit to get out and escape the dreadful feeling that you aren't the only one there. Better do it fast before finding out if you're right!
A collaborative effort with The Doc and MachineFossil.
_______________________________________________________
Keyboard Controls:

Walk/Climb: Arrow KeysInteract: Space/EnterCancel: Escape/Backspace
Gamepad:

Walk/Climb: Left Stick/D-Pad
Interact: A/XCancel: B/O
_______________________________________________________
Thanks for playing!

moreInfo.Tags: 3D, Dark, Escape Game, Horror, Pixel Art, Puzzle-Platformer, Side Scroller

game.title: Handico-op Groove
game.short_text: A rythm game that challenges your memory !

details.title: Handico-op Groove
details.description:
For a better experience, please download the game. Gameplay on browser may lag.
____________________________________

Tutorial :

You have to reproduce the movements of the ghosts
To do so, you have to remember either the rythm of their moves or their path
PINK has to remember the rythm and moves with WASD -> Follow the circles

BLUE has to remember the path and moves with the Arrow Keys -> Tap the right direction when the circle falls at your feet

____________________________________


Handico-op Groove is a Rythm and Memory game where you help two handicaped characters to dance ! It can be played either with a friend (each player controls a character) or alone (you choose the character you want to control).
A was made in 5 days for the Brackeys Jam 2022.2 as a team of 2.
____________________________________
CreSwanBones & Oraylien
Dev & Pixel art : Oraylien

moreInfo.Tags: memory, Music, Pixel Art

game.title: Unseen Forest
game.short_text: A radiation worker survived a huge explosion and almost lost his eye perception.

details.title: Unseen Forest
details.description:
Brackeys Game Jam 2022.2 projectA radiation worker survived a huge explosion and almost lost his eye perception. He could only see things close to him. In order to know what happened in the city, he must grope into an unseen forest and find a way out. The animals from the forest guided him on his way. Finally, he walked out and ...
Control: W, A, S, D to change direction, J & K to move one step
Recommend playing in fullscreen and wearing a headphone, the audio panning will show you where you should go.
Zekai Gong (NEU): programmer, composer, designer
Qirui Lin (NEU):  artist, sound designer, designer https://aavid-lin.itch.io/

game.title: NOT ALONE: Kill'em all!
game.short_text: space beat them all

details.title: NOT ALONE: Kill'em all!
details.description:
Welcome to NOT ALONE: Kill'em all!
This game is a nervous and colorful beat them all.
You play as the savior of the planet.
Your mission is simple: prevent the destruction of the planet Earth by any means necessary.
Between two victorious battles you will have the possibility to improve your ship. Its defense system, its weapons. 
You will not be able to take everything, you will have to make a choice. 
Here we think that every man has the right to choose how to destroy the invader!
NOT ALONE: Kill'em all is brought to you by Vercin Games with the precious artistic advice of Nokhyrr. 
Game developed for the Brackeys game jam 2022. It is not excluded that content is added if you liked the game experience.
Feel free to share your scores in the comments!
Enjoy the game!

moreInfo.Rating: Rated 5.0 out of 5 stars(1 total ratings)
moreInfo.Author: VercinGames
moreInfo.Tags: 3D, Beat 'em up, Colorful, Space, upgrades
